executiveSummary.headline: Your site scores 82/100 — a solid foundation with clear wins available.
executiveSummary.callToAction: The issues identified are actionable improvements that can increase search rankings, improve user experience, and drive more conversions.

issues.title: Poor Largest Contentful Paint
issues.description: LCP is 4. This issue affects 4 pages: /collections/all, /products/storage-box-black, /pages/contact, /pages/faq.

opportunitySummary.title: Growth Opportunities Identified
opportunitySummary.description: Addressing these items can directly impact your search rankings, page speed, and user engagement.

items.opportunity: Improve Largest Contentful Paint — slowest page is 5.45s. Optimize images and server response across 4 pages.
Improve mobile performance (score as low as 71/100) on 3 pages — mobile users are seeing much slower experiences than desktop.
Fix failed network requests — up to 17 failures per page across 5 pages.
Resolve navigation issues across 3 pages — fix broken anchors and link structure.

categories.name: Page Health

categories.name: Page Speed
categories.description: First Contentful Paint, Largest Contentful Paint, TTFB, and Total Blocking Time

categories.name: Resource Efficiency
categories.description: Speed Index (desktop + mobile) and mobile vs desktop rendering efficiency

categories.name: Mobile Experience
categories.description: Responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports

categories.name: Navigation & Links
categories.description: Broken links, anchor integrity, and navigation health

categories.name: Layout & UX
categories.description: Header, footer, logo, CTAs, and page structure completeness
